title: sesh configuration
description: Configuration for sesh, a smart terminal session manager

strict_mode.description: Disallow unknown fields in the configuration file

import.description: Paths to additional config files to import (supports ~ for home directory)

blacklist.description: List of session names to exclude

sort_order.description: Order in which session sources appear in the list

dir_length.description: Number of directory components to use when naming sessions (minimum 1)

separator_aware.description: Enable separator-aware configuration for the picker

tmux_command.description: Terminal multiplexer command to use instead of tmux (e.g. "psmux")

tui.description: Settings for the Sesh Picker TUI

show_icons.description: Show icons in the picker TUI

prompt.description: The prompt shown in the picker TUI

placeholder.description: The placeholder text in the picker TUI

default_session.description: Default settings applied to all sessions

startup_command.description: Shell command to run when a new session is created

preview_command.description: Command used to generate the preview for the session

windows.description: List of window names to create in the session

path.description: Absolute path to the session's working directory

disable_startup_command.description: Disable the default startup command for this session

startup_command.description: Shell command to run when this session is created (overrides default)

tmuxp.description: tmuxp session file to use for this session

tmuxinator.description: tmuxinator project to use for this session

preview_command.description: Command used to generate the preview for this session

windows.description: List of window names to create in this session

startup_script.description: Script to run when the window is created

wildcard.description: Wildcard configurations that match session paths by pattern

pattern.description: Glob pattern to match against session paths

startup_command.description: Shell command to run when a matching session is created

disable_startup_command.description: Disable the default startup command for matching sessions

preview_command.description: Command used to generate the preview for matching sessions

windows.description: Window layout to use for matching sessions

dashboard.description: Settings for the Sesh session dashboard

title.description: Title displayed in the dashboard header

sections.description: Dashboard sections to display (order determines layout position)

title.description: Section title displayed in the dashboard

width.description: Fraction of terminal width for this section (0.0–1.0, default 0.0 = auto)

row.description: Row index for vertical stacking. Sections with the same row are side by side; different rows stack vertically. Default 0.

patterns.description: Glob patterns matching session paths for this group

ssh.description: SSH hosts to display in an 'ssh' section

custom.description: Configuration for a 'custom' section that runs a command

command.description: Shell command to execute and display output

refresh.description: Refresh interval in seconds (0 = no auto-refresh)

docker.description: Configuration for a 'docker' section showing containers

all.description: Show all containers including stopped ones

git.description: Configuration for a 'git' section showing repository status

paths.description: Repository paths to monitor (supports ~ for home directory)

refresh.description: Refresh interval in seconds (0 = no auto-refresh)
